subject: docs: remove HISTORY.md — git history tracks completions
body:
Maintaining a separate HISTORY.md changelog duplicates what git
history already tracks. Removing it across the fleet.

Changes in glow-props:
- Deleted docs/HISTORY.md
- Removed HISTORY.md section from CLAUDE.md Documentation rules
- Updated TODO.md guidance: "delete completed items" instead of
  "move to HISTORY.md"
- Removed HISTORY.md from README.md file tree

Added USER_ACTIONS.md entry to propagate this policy change to all
10 downstream repos on their next session.

Tags: documentation, cleanup, policy, cross-project
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: docs-simplification
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CKqDf6SZ2KGeAXjZS2s91W
